description: Mechanically-derived D2 planted case (scripts/generate_gold_fixtures.py) for hard_rejection rule 'preserve-admission-discretion': counterparty removes/alters the protected clause in 'sec-1.2', deleting all of required_tokens ['sole discretion']. Must fire preserve-admission-discretion and result in REQUEST_CHANGE.

planted_variation.altered_hunk: The parties will address this subject in accordance with the terms otherwise set forth in this Agreement. This section otherwise continues to state: final authority; clinical care.
planted_variation.notes: Mechanically generated: replacement text omits all of required_tokens ['sole discretion'] for rule 'preserve-admission-discretion' (token_policy='any') while verbatim-preserving sibling required_tokens ['final authority', 'clinical care'] so no other rule sharing this topic is unintentionally tripped.

detector_expectation.rationale: Replacement text contains none of required_tokens ['sole discretion']; must fire 'preserve-admission-discretion' under token_policy='any'.
